title: Tatos Cobblemon
description: This is the Cobblemon-Create focused modpack for the Tatos Discord server.
body:
# Tatos Cobblemon Create pack
This is the Cobblemon modpack for the Tatos Discord Server.
A Vanilla Plus Fabric Kitchen-sink pack focused on Cobblemon & Create.

Currently Create is not in the pack as it is not available on Fabric 1.21.1!
Will be added in the future.


## Attributions

This modpack includes [Xali's Enchanted Books](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enchanted-books), if you like it, check it out it is awesome. All the textures and rights in that resourcepack belongs to Xali.
![Xalis Books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/677b15fb3b7e6dc56f0375f9c373e7e53778325d.png)
